data.title: 8x8 launches AI-powered solution Smart Assist for contact centers, aims to improve resolution, CX, and agent satisfaction.
data.description: Today, in Campbell, California, 8x8, Inc. announced the launch of 8x8 Smart Assist. This new AI-powered solution, from the company listed on NASDAQ as EGHT, offers real-time guidance, dynamic workflows, and intelligent automation.

data.title: Doc.com expands telemedicine to Florida, advancing AI and blockchain healthcare access. Milestone in US growth, residents can connect with licensed professionals.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Doc.com, a leading healthcare tech company, revealed the introduction of its telemedicine platform in Florida. This launch is a key step in its continuous expansion across the United States. The platform enables Florida residents to access licensed healthcare professionals through a user-friendly mobile interface. This move signifies a crucial advancement in the company's nationwide expansion strategy.

data.title: CD Valet survey shows 33% of banks offer digital CD account opening.
data.description: A new digital marketplace called CD Valet, based in Seattle, has been launched to link consumers with top verified high-yield CD rates across the country. This initiative aims to support community financial institutions in drawing new deposits successfully. The company shared findings from its recent survey conducted on Feb. 19, 2026, demonstrating its impact.

data.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition for Nintendo Switch 2 brings enhanced visuals, available today on Nintendo eShop.
data.description: In Redmond, Washington, the Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game has been released for the Nintendo Switch 2 system. It is now available on Nintendo eShop and the My Nintendo Store digitally. Gamers can enjoy a vast, planet-sized journey filled with exciting battles and massive mech-like Skells. The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition offers enhancements such as reaching up to a 4K resolution at a consistent frame rate of up to 60 fps when played in TV mode, and up to 1080p resolution and 60 fps in handheld mode.

data.title: Dr. Wudbhav N. Sankar named incoming Chief of Orthopedic Center at CHOP, known for expertise in hip disorders and spinal deformity.
data.description: Dr. Sankar, a renowned pediatric orthopedic specialist, specializing in hip disorders, spinal deformities, pediatric trauma, and patient-centered recovery, has joined Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP). The announcement was made in Philadelphia on February 19, 2026. Dr. Sankar's arrival at CHOP brings a wealth of experience and knowledge to the hospital's already esteemed team, enhancing the care provided to young patients.

data.title: DigitalOcean enhances Agentic Inference Cloud with AMD Instinct™ MI350X GPUs for AI workloads. NYSE: DOCN introduces high-performance GPU Droplets for AI at scale.
data.description: BROOMFIELD, Colorado - DigitalOcean (NYSE: DOCN) has introduced new high-performance GPU Droplets that are powered by AMD Instinct™ MI350X GPUs. These GPU Droplets are now available in their Agentic Inference Cloud, enabling efficient and powerful solutions for AI-native companies like ACE Studio to scale their inference workloads. In the upcoming quarter, DigitalOcean plans to deploy even more of these high-performance GPU Droplets to cater to the growing demand for AI solutions.

data.title: Salim Hirji, Partner in Private Equity at Apollo, named new board member of PetSmart Charities.
data.description: The newly appointed PetSmart Charities® board member, Salim Hirji, serves as a Partner in Private Equity at Apollo. His appointment symbolizes the linkage between business and philanthropy in benefiting both individuals and animals. This development was disclosed in Phoenix on February 19, 2026. Salim Hirji's background in private equity at Apollo enriches the board with valuable expertise.

data.title: Unified Women’s Healthcare and affiliates are expanding menopause care nationwide with Unified for You, addressing years of untreated menopause-related conditions.
data.description: Unified Women’s Healthcare (Unified) and its OBGYN affiliates are increasing access to perimenopause and menopause care across the country via Unified for You, a patient resource platform and awareness campaign. Launched in Florida, this initiative aims to address the late diagnosis issue, as revealed by recent data, that indicates numerous women suffer from untreated menopause-related issues for years before getting proper treatment. This campaign comes at a crucial time, emphasizing the significance of timely counseling and care for women’s health.

Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.43. Investors will be looking for Western Union to exceed this estimate and provide positive guidance for the next quarter. data.title: William Kim appointed as Chief Lifestyle Officer for Project B, focusing on premium lifestyle business as the global grand prix expands across Europe, Asia, Americas.
data.description: Project B, a leading global women's and men's basketball grand prix catering to a modern audience, has appointed William Kim as its Chief Lifestyle Officer. Kim will oversee Project B's luxury lifestyle division, focusing on merchandise, brand partnerships, and cultural collaborations as the organization grows across Europe, Asia, and the Americas. The aim is to establish Project B as the top cultural platform in global sports.

data.title: PPL to report earnings of $0.41 per share on 2026-02-20. Past EPS beat by $0.02. Focus on forecasted growth.
data.description: Energy company PPL (NYSE: PPL) is scheduled to release its latest quarterly earnings report on Friday, February 20, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.41 for this period. Investors are eagerly anticipating the possibility of PPL surpassing this estimate and also providing a positive outlook or growth forecast for the upcoming quarter. It is important to note that while beating or falling short of earnings estimates can impact stock prices, future guidance plays a significant role as well. In the previous quarter, PPL exceeded expectations with an EPS of $0.02 higher than anticipated. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Willow and HerMoney Media partner to offer financial planning for women to grow wealth and confidence.
data.description: In Boston, Willow (TrustWillow.com), a renowned WealthTech platform connecting women and families with tailored financial guidance, has revealed a key alliance with HerMoney Media. The partnership involves joining forces with the digital platform dedicated to offering personal finance content and coaching to empower women in financial matters. Both platforms share a common goal of enhancing financial confidence and wealth growth for women. The collaboration aims to further support this mission and expand outreach to more women seeking financial empowerment.

data.title: Costs of senior care rising: Assisted living now $5,419/month, memory care $6,690/month, independent living $3,200/month.
data.description: In New York, A Place for Mom, a significant platform aiding families through aging stages, unveiled its 2026 Costs of Long-Term Care and Senior Living Report, offering a detailed look at senior care pricing in the US. The report shows a rise in monthly costs, with national median costs exceeding $5,419 for assisted living (up from $5,190 in 2025) and $6,690 for memory care (up from $6,450). Independent living averages at $3,200.

data.title: Lamar Advertising (NASDAQ: LAMR) earnings report on 2026-02-20 expected to show EPS of $1.79. Anticipation high for guidance.
data.description: Lamar Advertising (NASDAQ: LAMR) is scheduled to reveal its latest quarterly financial results on Friday, 20th February 2026. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.79. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for Lamar Advertising to exceed expectations and provide favorable guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is crucial for new investors to recognize that while earnings performance holds significance, market responses are frequently influenced by guidance. data.title: Dividend 15 Split Corp declares $0.10 monthly for Class A ($1.20/yr) & $0.05833 for Preferred ($0.70/yr) on Feb. 19.
data.description: In a recent declaration, Dividend 15 Split Corp. announced its monthly distribution for shareholders. The company will be paying out $0.10000 for each Class A share, which amounts to $1.20 annually. Additionally, $0.05833 will be distributed for each Preferred share, totaling $0.700 per share annually. Shareholders can expect these distributions to be paid on March 10, 2026. To qualify for the upcoming distribution, shareholders must be recorded as shareholders by February 27, 2026.

data.title: February US automotive sales rise compared to January per JD Power global forecast; lower EV demand impact remains.
data.description: In Troy, Michigan, according to JD Power, February saw an improvement in sales compared to January. However, the impact of reduced demand for electric vehicles continues to be evident. Key numbers indicate a notable increase in sales figures for the month, though concerns persist regarding the lingering effects of decreased interest in EVs on the overall market.

data.description: Anglogold Ashanti (AU) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Friday, 2026-02-20, with analysts forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.94. data.title: Celebrate 12th Annual Teach Music Week with FREE lessons at 1,200+ locations. Happening March 16-22, 2026.
data.description: Philadelphia, on February 19, 2026 - Keep Music Alive is pleased to reveal the upcoming 12th Annual Teach Music Week set to take place from Monday, March 16th to Sunday, March 22nd, 2026. This highly anticipated week-long event serves as a celebration that welcomes participation from musicians, music schools, music stores, and various music-related entities.
